focus: q8 unset path to profile filename
q8 DB boundary and fp32 orphaning

findingDetails.title: Codex launcher note still shows old non-q8 DB basename
findingDetails.evidence: Config now routes through launcher but comments and _NOTE_1_DATABASE still name a non-q8, non-sanitized sqlite basename.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update Codex notes to say the path is derived or use the actual sanitized q8 basename.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared active runtime config with EmbeddingProfile slug derivation and runtime q8 path.

findingDetails.title: memory_health cannot report dtype despite recipe verification contract
findingDetails.evidence: EmbeddingProfile serializes dtype, but memory_health emits provider/model/dimension/databasePath only; SETUP_A_RECIPE.md tells operators to expect dtype=q8 from memory_health.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add dtype to handler profile type/output or update the verification contract.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked profile implementation, handler output construction, and operator recipe verification line.

findingDetails.title: Programmatic provider factory cannot pass hf-local dtype
findingDetails.evidence: HfLocalProvider accepts dtype, but CreateProviderOptions omits dtype and createProviderInstance does not forward it.
findingDetails.recommendation: Expose and forward dtype for hf-local, or document dtype as env-only.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked public option type and factory constructor call.

findingDetails.title: SearchResult still has mutable list default
findingDetails.evidence: rankingSignals remains declared as list[str] = []. Root validation P1s are resolved, but this P2 remains.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use a safe default/factory pattern or require the field.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Checked daemon root validation and protocol struct field.

findingDetails.title: 012 still says Codex launcher patch is sandbox-blocked after it landed
findingDetails.evidence: 012 summary, limitations, and grep evidence say Codex is blocked; .codex/config.toml at commit 42aa114e3 routes through the launcher.
findingDetails.recommendation: Mark Codex launcher parity resolved in 012 docs.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared 012 docs with committed Codex config.

findingDetails.title: 012 q8 filename examples use the wrong sanitized basename
findingDetails.evidence: Docs show onnx-community__embeddinggemma-300m-ONNX, but createProfileSlug lowercases and replaces slash with a single underscore.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use the actual sanitized basename or avoid hard-coded examples.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared 012 filename examples with profile slug code and runtime-derived path.

findingDetails.title: 014 handover still says 012 is in progress
findingDetails.evidence: Frontmatter and continuity say eleven packets shipped and 012 in progress, while the phase map and commit state show 001-012 complete.
findingDetails.recommendation: Refresh handover to post-012, commit 42aa114e3 state.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared handover frontmatter/body with parent phase map and commit state.

findingDetails.title: Setup A recipe q8 filename examples are not the emitted slug
findingDetails.evidence: Recipe hard-codes the same non-sanitized q8 basename and its ls command will not match the actual q8 DB name.
findingDetails.recommendation: Use actual sanitized basename or describe derivation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared recipe examples with EmbeddingProfile slug behavior.

findingDetails.title: tcpdump script comment still says Qwen3 cocoindex
findingDetails.evidence: Functional pktap fix landed, but the comment still describes Setup A as Qwen3 cocoindex after EmbeddingGemma unification.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Compared script header with post-012 default docs.

findingDetails.title: Full GitHub PAT remains in live .env
findingDetails.evidence: Masked key check confirms github_GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN is still present at line 12. Token value intentionally omitted.
findingDetails.recommendation: Rotate token outside agent flow and remove or replace local secret.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Masked env key-only check; no secret value copied.

findingDetails.title: Voyage shadow warning still fires after provider resolution in startup config path
findingDetails.evidence: resolveStartupEmbeddingConfig resolves provider and validates API key before getProviderInfoForResolution emits the auto-to-Voyage warning; getStartupEmbeddingProfile resolves provider without the shadow guard.
findingDetails.recommendation: Run the shadow guard before every startup/profile resolveProvider call, especially before validation and DB-path derivation.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Traced factory startup/profile code paths around resolveProvider, validateApiKey, and warning helpers.
